name: Routine Visual
descr: Drive-by or walk-over inspection by Level 1/2 inspector — TfNSW-BIM §4.3 annual or bi-annual cycle

name: Principal Inspection
descr: Detailed close-up inspection by accredited Level 3/4 inspector — TfNSW-BIM §4.2 max 5-year cycle

name: Post-Event Inspection
descr: Emergency inspection after flood event / vehicle impact / seismic activity — triggered immediately

name: Special Scour
descr: Post-flood or scheduled scour assessment — Austroads AP-G71.8 §5.2; required for scour-critical bridges

name: Underwater / Dive
descr: Submerged element inspection by qualified diver — required for scour-critical and high-risk foundations

name: Load Rating Review
descr: Structural assessment by NER/CPEng engineer per AS 5100.7:2017 — required every 10 years or after event

name: NDT Inspection
descr: Non-destructive testing — magnetic particle / ultrasonic for fatigue-sensitive steel bridges (AS 5100.6)
